name: FUTA Credit for State Unemployment Tax Contributions

eligibility.description: Available to employers who pay timely contributions to a state unemployment insurance program certified by the Secretary of Labor.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers can credit up to 5.4% of taxable wages against the 6.0% federal unemployment tax (FUTA) for contributions paid into a certified state unemployment fund.
